overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a cloaked character walking through a desolate coastal landscape with stormy skies. The character traverses from a grassy cliffside path through a narrow canyon with a wooden bridge overhead, then emerges onto an open beach with large rock formations and distant ruins visible through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy coastal path approaching cliffside ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward a ruined structure perched on a cliffside, cape flowing behind

entered.detail: wooden ruin perched atop a rocky cliff with warm light glowing from within
worn dirt trail cutting through tall grass
tall wild grasses and vegetation flanking the path
tall stone structure barely visible through the coastal fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through tall grass toward a ruined wooden structure atop a cliff. The overcast sky casts a diffuse gray light over the desolate coastal landscape, with a distant tower barely visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon entrance with wooden bridge overhead

events.description: character turns left approaching the cliff, revealing a wooden bridge spanning a narrow canyon ahead

agents.ego_description: turning left toward the canyon entrance while approaching the cliffside structure

entered.detail: rickety wooden bridge with support beams spanning the canyon gap between cliffs
steep rocky cliff faces forming a narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and approaches a narrow canyon passage, revealing a wooden bridge suspended overhead between the cliff faces. The grassy terrain gives way to rocky ground as the ruined structure moves to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage beneath wooden bridge

events.description: exiting the narrow canyon into the open coastal area with ocean visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the misty canyon passage with rocky walls closing in on both sides

entered.detail: calm sea visible through the canyon exit, merging with the foggy horizon

segments.scene_description: The character traverses the narrow canyon passage with steep rock walls on both sides, passing beneath the wooden bridge overhead. As the character approaches the canyon exit, the ocean becomes visible through the mist ahead, signaling the transition to the open coast.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky beach with coastal formations

events.description: character turns right to follow the coastline, revealing a large rock formation

agents.ego_description: walking along the desolate beach, cape billowing in the wind, surveying the open coastal landscape

entered.detail: massive rounded boulder sitting on the sandy shore
sandy and rocky coastal ground with tidal pools

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canyon, the character turns right onto a wide open beach with the ocean stretching to the horizon. A large coastal rock dominates the right side of the frame as the character walks along the desolate shoreline, with distant ruins and towers visible through the stormy mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate cliffside trail into the depths of a narrow rocky canyon. It begins with the character walking through tall grass toward a ruined wooden structure under a diffuse gray, overcast sky. As the character turns left, the grassy terrain gives way to rocky ground and the ruined structure shifts to the side to reveal a wooden bridge suspended overhead between steep cliff faces. The camera then follows the character through the narrow passage, passing beneath the bridge and between towering rock walls. Finally, the scene opens as the character reaches the canyon exit, where the ocean emerges through the mist to signal the transition to the open coast.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character emerges from a confined canyon into the vast, desolate expanse of a stormy coastline. It begins with the character turning right to leave the canyon walls behind, immediately opening up to a wide beach where the ocean stretches toward a distant horizon. As the character advances along the shoreline, the perspective shifts to highlight a massive coastal rock dominating the right side of the frame. The scene then expands further into the misty atmosphere, revealing the silhouettes of distant ruins and towers flickering through the heavy storm clouds.
